product_definition.title: Multiplayer Base System
product_definition.description: A foundational multiplayer framework for UE5.5. Covers session management, lobby, team assignment, player state synchronization, server-side validation, and latency compensation utilities. Built on OnlineSubsystem.
product_definition.target_audience: Multiplayer game developers targeting PC and console

core_features: Session management: Create, Find, Join, Destroy sessions
Lobby subsystem with ready-check and player list replication
Team assignment system with balanced auto-assign
UMythPlayerState with replicated team, score, ping
UMythGameState with match timer, phase, team scores
Lag compensation via rewind buffer for hit detection
Travel management: seamless travel with state persistence
Network stats HUD widget (ping, packet loss)

demo_map_requirements.test_scenario: Two clients connect, join teams, ready-check completes, seamless travel
